description: Build QuantDocs frontend - complete Next.js app with document browser, rich text editor placeholder, presence indicators, comments panel, version history, sharing dialog, AI sidebar
steps: Update apps/quantdocs/package.json: add next, react, react-dom, @tanstack/react-query to dependencies. Add @types/react, @types/react-dom, autoprefixer, postcss, tailwindcss to devDependencies. Update scripts to: dev='next dev --port 3005', build='next build', start='next start', typecheck='tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.backend.json'
Replace apps/quantdocs/tsconfig.json with Next.js-compatible config (copy pattern from apps/quantmail/tsconfig.json, paths for @quant/shared-ui and @quant/common)
Create apps/quantdocs/next.config.mjs: transpilePackages=['@quant/shared-ui','@quant/common'], output='standalone'
Create apps/quantdocs/tailwind.config.ts (same pattern as quantmail)
Create apps/quantdocs/postcss.config.mjs (same pattern)
Create apps/quantdocs/src/app/globals.css (same Tailwind + CSS vars pattern)
Create apps/quantdocs/src/app/layout.tsx with Inter font, metadata title='QuantDocs', QueryProvider
Create apps/quantdocs/src/app/error.tsx (same error pattern)
Create apps/quantdocs/src/app/loading.tsx (skeleton loading pattern)
Create apps/quantdocs/src/providers/query-provider.tsx
Create apps/quantdocs/src/hooks/useDocuments.ts - useQuery hook for fetching document list
Create apps/quantdocs/src/hooks/useDocument.ts - useQuery hook for fetching single document by ID
Create apps/quantdocs/src/components/DocList.tsx - document browser with grid/list toggle, search, sort. Use Card, SearchInput from shared-ui
Create apps/quantdocs/src/components/DocToolbar.tsx - rich text toolbar (bold/italic/underline/heading/list buttons) above editor
Create apps/quantdocs/src/components/DocEditor.tsx - contenteditable div wrapped in a styled container with the toolbar. Placeholder for real Yjs wiring in Phase 66
Create apps/quantdocs/src/components/PresenceBar.tsx - row of Avatar components showing who is currently viewing the doc
Create apps/quantdocs/src/components/CommentsPanel.tsx - side panel listing comments on the document with reply capability
Create apps/quantdocs/src/components/VersionHistory.tsx - panel showing document version list with timestamps and restore button
Create apps/quantdocs/src/components/ShareDialog.tsx - Dialog from shared-ui for sharing document with users/permissions
Create apps/quantdocs/src/components/AISidebar.tsx - sidebar panel with AI actions (rewrite, summarize, translate buttons) using Button from shared-ui
Create apps/quantdocs/src/app/page.tsx - main page showing DocList. Uses AppShell with Sidebar for navigation (All Docs, Recent, Shared, Templates, Trash)
Create apps/quantdocs/src/app/doc/[id]/page.tsx - document editor page with DocToolbar, DocEditor, PresenceBar, and toggleable side panels (CommentsPanel, VersionHistory, AISidebar)
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck passes including @quant/quantdocs typecheck task
pnpm build passes including @quant/quantdocs next build
No inline mock data arrays - all data via useQuery hooks
findings: Badge variant must be one of: default, primary, success, warning, danger, info (no 'secondary'). styled-jsx works in Next.js app. React.use(params) pattern works for Next.js 15 dynamic route params with Promise<{id: string}> typing. Build produces standalone output successfully.
